# Bonuz Technology DMCC

> Dubai-based software development house building self-custodial wallets, digital identity solutions, and blockchain infrastructure for human sovereignty.

## Company Overview

Bonuz Technology DMCC is a Dubai-based software development company founded in 2018 by Matthias Mende, who also co-founded the Dubai Blockchain Center. The company specializes in blockchain, Web3, AI, AR, and spatial computing technologies. Our mission: forge invisible technology that makes humans sovereign.

- Founded: 2018
- Headquarters: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Legal Entity: Bonuz Technology DMCC
- Industry: Blockchain & Web3 Software Development
- Slogan: "We forge invisible technology that makes humans sovereign."

## Core Products

### bonuz Lifestyle Wallet
Award-winning consumer-grade self-custodial wallet with social features, quests, and loyalty programs for the real world. Built to feel like a normal app while maintaining full self-custody of digital assets and private keys. Available for iOS and Android.
- URL: https://bonuz.xyz
- Category: FinanceApplication
- Platforms: iOS, Android
- Price: Free

### bonuz ID
A unified profile layer where people connect their favorite links, socials, and presence into one simple public page. Think of it as a more advanced and free alternative to Linktree, with blockchain-based identity verification.
- URL: https://bonuz.id
- Category: SocialNetworkingApplication
- Price: Free

### bonuz Partner Dashboard
Comprehensive dashboard for brand partners (events, restaurants, communities, enterprises, creators) to create real-world quests, loyalty or membership programs using easy-to-use tools.
- URL: https://app.bonuz.market
- Category: BusinessApplication

### bonuz Events
Event platform for real-world and digital events, natively integrated with the bonuz ecosystem. Brand events, quests, and activations created through the Partner Dashboard are surfaced here for users to discover and join. Similar to Luma and Meetup.
- URL: https://app.bonuz.xyz
- Category: SocialNetworkingApplication
- Price: Free

### Onchain Chess
Fully onchain player-versus-player chess game. Every move is recorded on the blockchain, creating transparent, verifiable, and permanent game records.
- URL: https://onchainchess.com
- Category: GameApplication
- Price: Free

### Habibi Pass
Tourist engagement platform for the UAE that connects visitors with local restaurants and businesses through vouchers, rewards, and exclusive deals. A win-win for tourists and local businesses.
- URL: https://habibipass.bonuz.xyz
- Category: TravelApplication
- Price: Free

### UAE971
The UAE's national creator index, tracking every voice building the country's global reputation on social media. Indexes residents, visitors, and international creators across all seven Emirates.
- URL: https://uae971.social
- Category: SocialNetworkingApplication
- Price: Free

### Kilocorn
The trillion-dollar index — defining the kilocorn era. Tracks companies and assets valued at $1 trillion or more, the natural evolution of startup nomenclature.
- URL: https://kilocorn.com
- Category: ReferenceApplication
- Price: Free

### SkyShield (Non-Profit Research)
A non-profit, open-source research concept exploring whether commercial FPV drones could be used for community-based coastal defense. All research is published openly. Not affiliated with any arms manufacturer.
- URL: https://skyshield.bonuz.tech
- Classification: Non-Profit, Open Source Research

## Services

### White-label Blockchain Platforms
Custom branded apps using Bonuz core modules including identity, wallet structure, quest, loyalty and membership systems. Same engine, different skins, customized journeys. Ideal for enterprises wanting to launch blockchain-powered apps without building from scratch.

### Blockchain & Web3 Consulting
Product architecture, user experience, and infrastructure consulting for teams building in the blockchain ecosystem. Selective engagements for projects aligned with the bonuz ecosystem.

## Key Technologies
- Self-custodial wallet infrastructure
- Onchain digital identity (DID / SSI)
- Smart contract development
- Loyalty & membership systems on blockchain
- AR spatial computing
- AI integration
- White-label platform architecture
- Full-stack product development (React, Next.js, Node.js, Solidity)

## Founder

Matthias Mende — Entrepreneur and builder based in Dubai, active in blockchain and consumer technology since early days. Co-founded the Dubai Blockchain Center in 2018.
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/mendematthias
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/matthiasmende
- bonuz ID: https://bonuz.id/mende
